info.title: dotnet-xbdd
info.description: Dotnet tools for working with xBDD.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Creates a new test project initialized for xBDD

commands.name: project
commands.description: Provides access to project level commands.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generates code for a test project in the current folder.

commands.name: mstest
commands.description: Creates an MSTest project that uses xBDD.

options.name: --testrun-name
options.description: Sets the default test run name in the xBDDConfig.json file.

options.name: --remove-from-capability-name
options.description: Sets the default test run name in the xBDDConfig.json file.

commands.name: xunit
commands.description: Creates an MSTest project that uses xBDD.

commands.name: solution
commands.description: Provides access to solution level commands.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generates code for a test project in the current folder.

commands.name: mstest
commands.description: Creates an MSTest project that uses xBDD.

commands.name: xunit
commands.description: Creates an xUnit project that uses xBDD.

commands.name: summarize
commands.description: Creates an HTML Summary report for the JSON test run reports specified.

options.name: --config-file
options.description: File path to the xBDD config file.
